title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Hiranandani Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Hiranandani Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Hiranandani Group has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hiranandani Group:
Hiranandani Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hiranandani Group!
